name: Arizona Sonoran Copper Company Inc.
description: Arizona Sonoran Copper Company Inc. is an early-stage copper exploration and development company. The company's principal asset is the 100% owned Cactus Project, a past-producing mine located on private land in Pinal County, Arizona. Arizona Sonoran is focused on developing the Cactus Project to supply the domestic US market with responsibly sourced copper, utilizing heap leach extraction and SX-EW processing to produce high-purity copper cathodes.
